name: Peanut Butter Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together the peanut butter, butter, and sugars until creamy.
2. Add eggs one at a time, then vanilla. Mix in flour, baking powder, and salt separately.
3. Gradually stir the dry ingredients into the wet mixture until well combined.
4. Stir in 1 package (6 oz) of chocolate chips.
5. Pour batter evenly into a greased 13 x 9 x 2 inch pan.
6. Sprinkle remaining chocolate chips on top.
7. Bake at 350 degrees for 3 minutes.
8. Remove from oven and lightly run a knife back and forth in the batter a few times to create a marble pattern.
9. Return pan to oven and bake an additional 30 minutes, or until firm in the center and edges begin to pull away from the sides of the pan.
10. Cool on wire rack.
